# HayVista

> AI-powered Google Business Profile automation for local businesses — $17/month.

HayVista is a SaaS product that fully automates Google Business Profile (GBP) management for local businesses. It connects to a business's GBP via Google OAuth, reads real profile data, and runs three parallel automation engines around the clock.

## What HayVista Does

### Post Engine (runs Mon, Wed, Fri at 9 AM)
- Reads that week's top search queries from Google Search Console
- Picks the most relevant photo using Claude Haiku computer vision
- Writes a GBP post in the business's tone using Claude AI (Sonnet)
- Holds the post in a 24-hour review window — owner can edit, discard, or publish immediately
- If untouched after 24 hours, the post publishes to Google automatically

### Review Reply Engine (triggered on every new customer review)
- Generates an AI-drafted reply for every incoming Google review
- Detects the reviewer's tone (casual, technical, angry, enthusiastic) and mirrors it
- Mentions the specific service and location naturally for local SEO value
- 24-hour review window — owner can edit, cancel, or post immediately
- If untouched after 24 hours, the reply goes live on Google automatically

### Q&A Engine (scans every 6 hours)
- Scans Google Business Q&A for unanswered customer questions
- Drafts AI answers grounded in the business's real services, hours, and context
- 24-hour review window — same controls as posts and reviews
- If untouched after 24 hours, the answer posts to the profile automatically

## Additional Features
- SEO photo uploads: photos are enriched with AI-generated EXIF metadata before uploading to GBP
- Editable photo descriptions: users can label photos; labels sync to GBP so Google indexes them
- Profile editor: update hours, services, description with 7 business-type templates (contractor, restaurant, store, salon, hotel, medical, real estate)
- Social links sync: Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, YouTube, LinkedIn — syncs to GBP URL attributes
- Performance insights: weekly Google Search Console data — impressions, clicks, top queries
- Weekly email digest: summary of GBP performance delivered every Monday

## Pricing
- $17/month, no contracts, cancel anytime
- Everything included in one plan

## Business Types Supported
General Contractors, Plumbers, Electricians, HVAC, Landscapers, Restaurants, Cafes, Bars, Bakeries, Hair Salons, Barbershops, Spas, Nail Studios, Hotels, Motels, Bed & Breakfasts, Doctors, Dentists, Clinics, Therapists, Real Estate Agents, Property Managers, Realtors, Retail Stores, Boutiques, Markets

## Technical Stack
- AI: Anthropic Claude (claude-sonnet-4-6 for posts/replies, claude-haiku-4-5 for photo labeling)
- GBP integration: Google Business Profile API (official, OAuth-authorized)
- Search data: Google Search Console API
- Frontend: React + TypeScript + Vite + Tailwind CSS (deployed on Vercel)
- Backend: Node.js + Express (deployed on Railway)
- Database: PostgreSQL

- Website: https://hayvista.com
- Email: hayvista@gmail.com
- Location: Cabo San Lucas, Baja California Sur, Mexico
